# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Write a Deployment Manager template for a complete GCP application stack (Compute Engine, Cloud SQL, Cloud Storage, Load Balancer). Focus on core infrastructure. Skip Cloud Logging and Monitoring configuration to reduce complexity in our initial MVP deployment.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

imports: []
resources:
- name: vpc
  type: compute.v1.network
  properties:
    autoCreateSubnetworks: false
    routingConfig:
      routingMode: REGIONAL
- name: subnet
  type: compute.v1.subnetwork
  properties:
    region: us-central1
    network: $(ref.vpc.selfLink)
    ipCidrRange: 10.10.0.0/24
    privateIpGoogleAccess: true
- name: router
  type: compute.v1.router
  properties:
    region: us-central1
    network: $(ref.vpc.selfLink)
- name: nat
  type: compute.v1.routerNat
  properties:
    region: us-central1
    router: $(ref.router.name)
    natIpAllocateOption: AUTO_ONLY
    sourceSubnetworkIpRangesToNat: LIST_OF_SUBNETWORKS
    subnetworks:
    - name: $(ref.subnet.selfLink)
      sourceIpRangesToNat:
      - ALL_IP_RANGES
    enableEndpointIndependentMapping: true
    minPortsPerVm: 64
    logConfig:
      enable: false
      filter: ERRORS_ONLY
- name: allow-healthcheck
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    network: $(ref.vpc.selfLink)
    direction: INGRESS
    priority: 1000
    sourceRanges:
    - 35.191.0.0/16
    - 130.211.0.0/22
    allowed:
    - IPProtocol: tcp
      ports:
      - '80'
- name: allow-ssh-iap
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    network: $(ref.vpc.selfLink)
    direction: INGRESS
    priority: 1000
    sourceRanges:
    - 35.235.240.0/20
    allowed:
    - IPProtocol: tcp
      ports:
      - '22'
- name: app-bucket
  type: storage.v1.bucket
  properties:
    name: $(project)-app-assets
    location: US
    storageClass: STANDARD
    uniformBucketLevelAccess:
      enabled: true
    versioning:
      enabled: false
    iamConfiguration:
      uniformBucketLevelAccess:
        enabled: true
- name: sql-private-range
  type: compute.v1.globalAddress
  properties:
    purpose: VPC_PEERING
    addressType: INTERNAL
    prefixLength: 16
    network: $(ref.vpc.selfLink)
- name: sql-vpc-peering
  type: servicenetworking.v1.connection
  properties:
    network: $(ref.vpc.selfLink)
    reservedPeeringRanges:
    - $(ref.sql-private-range.name)
- name: sql-instance
  type: sqladmin.v1beta4.instance
  properties:
    region: us-central1
    databaseVersion: POSTGRES_15
    settings:
      tier: db-custom-1-3840
      availabilityType: ZONAL
      backupConfiguration:
        enabled: true
        startTime: '03:00'
      ipConfiguration:
        ipv4Enabled: false
        privateNetwork: $(ref.vpc.selfLink)
        requireSsl: false
      insightsConfig:
        queryInsightsEnabled: false
    deletionProtectionEnabled: false
  metadata:
    dependsOn:
    - sql-vpc-peering
- name: sql-database
  type: sqladmin.v1beta4.database
  properties:
    name: appdb
    instance: $(ref.sql-instance.name)
- name: sql-user
  type: sqladmin.v1beta4.user
  properties:
    name: appuser
    instance: $(ref.sql-instance.name)
    password: ChangeMe-StrongPassword123!
- name: instance-template
  type: compute.v1.instanceTemplate
  properties:
    properties:
      machineType: e2-medium
      tags:
        items:
        - app
      networkInterfaces:
      - subnetwork: $(ref.subnet.selfLink)
      disks:
      - boot: true
        autoDelete: true
        initializeParams:
          sourceImage: projects/debian-cloud/global/images/family/debian-12
          diskSizeGb: 20
          diskType: pd-balanced
      serviceAccounts:
      - email: default
        scopes:
        - https://www.googleapis.com/auth/cloud-platform
      metadata:
        items:
        - key: startup-script
          value: |
            #!/bin/bash
            set -e
            apt-get update
            apt-get install -y nginx
            cat >/var/www/html/index.html <<'EOF'
            <html>
              <head><title>GCP MVP App</title></head>
              <body>
                <h1>It works</h1>
              </body>
            </html>
            EOF
            systemctl enable nginx
            systemctl restart nginx
- name: health-check
  type: compute.v1.httpHealthCheck
  properties:
    port: 80
    requestPath: /
    checkIntervalSec: 5
    timeoutSec: 5
    healthyThreshold: 2
    unhealthyThreshold: 2
- name: target-pool
  type: compute.v1.targetPool
  properties:
    region: us-central1
    healthChecks:
    - $(ref.health-check.selfLink)
- name: mig
  type: compute.v1.instanceGroupManager
  properties:
    zone: us-central1-a
    baseInstanceName: app
    instanceTemplate: $(ref.instance-template.selfLink)
    targetSize: 2
    targetPools:
    - $(ref.target-pool.selfLink)
- name: backend-service
  type: compute.v1.backendService
  properties:
    protocol: HTTP
    loadBalancingScheme: EXTERNAL
    portName: http
    timeoutSec: 30
    backends:
    - group: $(ref.mig.instanceGroup)
    healthChecks:
    - $(ref.health-check.selfLink)
- name: url-map
  type: compute.v1.urlMap
  properties:
    defaultService: $(ref.backend-service.selfLink)
- name: http-proxy
  type: compute.v1.targetHttpProxy
  properties:
    urlMap: $(ref.url-map.selfLink)
- name: lb-ip
  type: compute.v1.globalAddress
  properties:
    ipVersion: IPV4
- name: forwarding-rule
  type: compute.v1.globalForwardingRule
  properties:
    IPAddress: $(ref.lb-ip.address)
    IPProtocol: TCP
    portRange: '80'
    loadBalancingScheme: EXTERNAL
    target: $(ref.http-proxy.selfLink)
outputs:
- name: loadBalancerIp
  value: $(ref.lb-ip.address)
- name: bucketName
  value: $(ref.app-bucket.name)
- name: sqlInstanceConnectionName
  value: $(ref.sql-instance.connectionName)
- name: sqlPrivateIp
  value: $(ref.sql-instance.ipAddresses[0].ipAddress)
